name: Ann's Strawberry Angel-Food Cake W/sauces-pt1
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Finely ground date sugar or superfine sugar
1/2 cup Strawberries, thinly sliced (fresh or frozen)
1 cup Strawberries, sliced fresh or frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Sift together flour and half a cup of sugar into a large bowl. Set aside.
3. In another bowl, beat egg whites until foamy. Add cream of tartar and continue beating until soft peaks form.
4. Gradually add the remaining half cup of sugar, two tablespoons at a time, beating until stiff peaks form.
5. Fold in the flour-sugar mixture, half at a time. Fold in vanilla extract and strawberries.
6. Pour batter into an ungreased 10-inch tube pan, spreading evenly and deflating any large air pockets with a knife.
7. Bake for 40 minutes, or until cake is lightly browned and springy.
8. Invert the pan and let the cake cool for 40 minutes.
9. Remove the cake from the pan and set it on a serving plate.
